[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10111110 6
1 01101111 6
2 10010010 3
3 01100011 4
4 00001000 1
5 11111011 7
6 10000000 1
7 10001001 3

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00001000 1 match 4
23 32 10000000 1 match 6
34 43 10000000 1 match 6
45 54 00000001 1
56 65 01000001 2
67 76 10010000 2
70 07 00000010 1

02 20 01100011 4 match 3
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 10001001 3 match 7
35 53 00000000 a
46 64 10001001 3 match 7
57 75 00000010 1
60 06 01100001 3
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 00000000 a
14 41 00001000 1 match 4
25 52 01000011 3
36 63 10000000 1 match 6
47 74 10000000 1 match 6
50 05 01000011 3
61 16 00001000 1 match 4
72 27 10010010 3 match 2

04 40 00000001 1
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 11111001 6
37 73 10000000 1 match 6
